Class StreamRedactionSummary

java.lang.Object
com.semanticprivacyguard.stream.StreamRedactionSummary
public final class StreamRedactionSummary extends Object
Aggregated statistics returned by StreamProcessor after processing a stream, file, or sequence of lines.

Because stream processing never holds the full document in memory, a per-line RedactionResult is not available after the fact. This summary provides the document-level counts that callers need for auditing, alerting, and observability.

StreamRedactionSummary summary = spg.redactStream(inputStream, outputStream);

System.out.printf("Scanned %d lines, found PII on %d (%.1f%%)%n",
    summary.getTotalLines(),
    summary.getLinesWithPII(),
    summary.getPIILineRatio() * 100);

summary.getMatchCountByType()
       .forEach((type, count) ->
           System.out.printf("  %s: %d%n", type.getLabel(), count));
Since:
1.1.0
Author:
Hemant Naik

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    StreamRedactionSummary(long totalLines, long linesWithPII, long totalMatches, long processingTimeMs, Map<PIIType,Long> matchCountByType)
    Constructs a StreamRedactionSummary.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    getLinesWithPII()
    Returns the number of lines on which at least one PII match was found.
    Map<PIIType,Long>
    getMatchCountByType()
    Returns an unmodifiable map from PIIType to the number of times that type was detected across all lines.
    double
    getPIILineRatio()
    Returns the fraction of lines that contained PII, in the range [0.0, 1.0].
    long
    getProcessingTimeMs()
    Returns the wall-clock processing time for the full pass in milliseconds.
    long
    getTotalLines()
    Returns the total number of lines read from the source.
    long
    getTotalMatches()
    Returns the total number of individual PII matches across all lines.
    boolean
    hasPII()
    Returns true if at least one PII match was found anywhere in the stream.
    String
    toString()
    Returns a human-readable one-line summary.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • StreamRedactionSummary

      public StreamRedactionSummary(long totalLines, long linesWithPII, long totalMatches, long processingTimeMs, Map<PIIType,Long> matchCountByType)
      Constructs a StreamRedactionSummary.
      Parameters:
      totalLines - total number of lines read
      linesWithPII - number of lines that contained at least one PII match
      totalMatches - total number of individual PII matches across all lines
      processingTimeMs - wall-clock time for the full processing pass in ms
      matchCountByType - per-type match counts (defensive copy is taken)

  • Method Details

    • getTotalLines

      public long getTotalLines()
      Returns the total number of lines read from the source.

    • getLinesWithPII

      public long getLinesWithPII()
      Returns the number of lines on which at least one PII match was found.

    • getTotalMatches

      public long getTotalMatches()
      Returns the total number of individual PII matches across all lines.

    • getProcessingTimeMs

      public long getProcessingTimeMs()
      Returns the wall-clock processing time for the full pass in milliseconds.

    • getMatchCountByType

      public Map<PIIType,Long> getMatchCountByType()
      Returns an unmodifiable map from PIIType to the number of times that type was detected across all lines.

    • hasPII

      public boolean hasPII()
      Returns true if at least one PII match was found anywhere in the stream.

    • getPIILineRatio

      public double getPIILineRatio()
      Returns the fraction of lines that contained PII, in the range [0.0, 1.0]. Returns 0.0 if no lines were read.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a human-readable one-line summary. 
      StreamRedactionSummary[lines=1000, linesWithPII=42, matches=67, timeMs=38]
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
